Adds event listener aliases and error stack trace logging for Pebble's JavaScript environment.

# Purpose
This code is an immediately invoked function expression (IIFE) that checks for the presence of a `Pebble` object and sets up event handling aliases. It provides narrow functionality by creating aliases `p.on` and `p.off` for `p.addEventListener` and `p.removeEventListener`, respectively, to simplify event management. Additionally, it includes error handling for Android WebView-based environments by attaching an error event listener to the `window` object. This listener logs the error message and stack trace to the console if an uncaught error occurs. The code ensures that these functionalities are only executed if the `Pebble` object is defined.
